<h1> 👋 Hey there, I'm Shrey!</h1>

<img align="right" alt="Coding" width="400" src="https://images-wixmp-ed30a86b8c4ca887773594c2.wixmp.com/f/07222756-2fef-4823-aece-10a685f3d77c/dasv7g5-3a7c0998-a1ff-4c6d-99f3-2fc8b834f45c.gif?token=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..e8XQ_8qvYGlIyIWdlGWkozxfM4Z_HzEwPNpyaF850wQ">

I enjoy a good challenge, building fast, but most importantly shipping code that's built to last. 

At work, this basically means building multi-system AI pipelines for data & products. Outside of work, I'm deep in the hackathon space. Having been to dozens of them, won several of the biggest ones across Toronto, and now actively mentoring and judging them.

My love for building scalable systems also translated into more hours than I’d like to admit in games like Satisfactory and Factorio 😋
